codeReview.summary: Comprehensive error handling implemented across all 8 screens with ErrorBanner, NetworkErrorBanner, ErrorDialog, and ConfirmDialog components. Network errors are classified into timeout, connection, offline, and server types with user-friendly messages. All screens have retry and dismiss capabilities for recovery. Fixed bug in session_page streaming error handling.

issues.description: _classify_network_error method is duplicated across 3 screens (login, register, session_page). Should be refactored into a shared utility in error_components.py or a separate utils module.
_is_network_error_message method is duplicated across 3 screens (login, register, session_page). Should be refactored into a shared utility.
_is_network_error_message and _classify_network_error are duplicated from login_screen and register_screen. Should be a shared utility.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Network error classification logic (_is_network_error_message, _classify_network_error) is duplicated verbatim in 3 screens. This violates DRY principle. A shared utility function in error_components.py or a dedicated utils module would be appropriate.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: login_screen.py:133-168, register_screen.py:147-175, session_page.py:597-625 — identical implementation of network error classification

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure was followed correctly. Worker created error_components.py as a new module and enhanced all screens. No deviations from expected procedure.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows followedProcedure: true with no deviations

summary: Feature implementation passes review. Created error_components.py with 4 reusable error handling components (ErrorBanner, NetworkErrorBanner, ErrorDialog, ConfirmDialog). All 8 screens (login, register, onboarding, home, profile, history, settings, session) now have error banners with retry/dismiss capabilities. Network errors are classified into 5 types with user-friendly messages. Fixed streaming error callback bug in session_page. Non-blocking issue: network error classification logic is duplicated across 3 screens and should be refactored into a shared utility.
